headline: IBM And ServiceNow Target Enterprise AI Scale While Seeding Future Talent
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) and ServiceNow announced a new partnership to address barriers to scaling enterprise AI by modernizing legacy IT systems and making enterprise data usable for agentic AI. The collaboration combines IBM and ServiceNow AI platforms to support autonomous IT operations for large organizations. Separately, IBM expanded its global SkillsBuild program with JA Worldwide to provide AI and digital skills training to up to 1,000,000 high school students around the world. For investors...

headline: Shares of software and AI cloud-related companies are trading lower amid possible sympathy with Oracle after the company reported Q4 financial results and announced a $40 billion financing plan for FY27. The financing needs to fund aggressive capex spending may be giving investors pause.

headline: ServiceNow and IBM Expand Collaboration to Unlock Enterprise Data for AI at Scale
summary: ARMONK, N.Y. & SANTA CLARA, Calif., June 11, 2026--IBM (NYSE: IBM) and ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW), the AI control tower for business reinvention, today announced an expanded collaboration to address two of the biggest barriers blocking enterprise AI at scale: the AI-ready data problem and the legacy application layer. The partnership combines IBM’s AI, data and automation capabilities with the ServiceNow AI Platform to help enterprises break through outdated systems and put their data to work for AI

headline: Ondaro Launches Lighthouse, an AI-Enabled Activation Plan for ServiceNow’s AI Control Tower
summary: SAN DIEGO, June 11, 2026--Ondaro, a ServiceNow Elite Partner, today announced Ondaro Lighthouse, an AI-enabled activation plan that closes the AI visibility gap and tells enterprises where to start with ServiceNow’s AI Control Tower and what to turn on first.

headline: Buy, Hold, or Sell: Dropping 21% in a Week as a New Fed Chair Steps In, Is ServiceNow an Absolute Steal at $107?
summary: At $106.97, ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) looks dislocated from fundamentals. The stock has shed 16.2% in a week and 30.17% year to date as a new Federal Reserve chair takes over and the software sector flushes, creating a setup where price has detached from fundamentals. ServiceNow runs the dominant workflow automation platform for the Global 2000, and ... headline: ServiceNow Security Incident Tests Core Workflow And AI Governance Story
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) has disclosed a security incident involving unauthorized access through a vulnerable API endpoint. The issue affected certain customer instances and prompted an urgent company wide security update and patch. Impacted clients have been notified directly as part of the response process. For investors watching ServiceNow at a share price of $106.06, this security event comes alongside mixed recent returns, with the stock down 10% over the past week but up 15.9% over the...
